name: UrbanCare AI
tagline: AI-Native Clinical Ecosystem for Mechanistic Interpretability
shortDescription: A 30-agent, 8-layer clinical pipeline built on MedGemma + TxGemma + Gemini. Provides a Semantics-to-Vector interface so physicians can inspect how medical AI models reach their diagnoses — from lab report extraction and X-ray fracture detection to differential diagnosis and voice copilot.
fullDescription: Production-ready AI-native clinical dashboard acting as a Doctor Consultant. Leverages Google HAI-DEF open-weight models (MedGemma 4B for vision/document tasks, TxGemma for therapeutic reasoning). Features a transparent Semantics-to-Vector interface bridging human-readable clinical semantics and internal model vectors — making AI reasoning auditable at every layer. Multi-tenant hospital platform with role-based access control, real-time vitals SSE streaming, and voice clinical copilot powered by RAG over patient memory vectors.
problem: Most clinical AI is a black box — physicians can't audit how a diagnosis was reached, so they can't trust it and compliance teams can't sign off on it.
solution: A Semantics-to-Vector interface that bridges human-readable clinical semantics and internal model vectors, making every layer of the 30-agent pipeline inspectable — from lab-report extraction to differential diagnosis.
lessons: Interpretability isn't a feature you bolt on at the end — for clinical tools, it has to be the interface itself.

name: Bruhworking — NexusFlow
tagline: Serverless Agent Swarm for Stateful Orchestration
shortDescription: Async multi-agent orchestration engine built with Google ADK + Gemini 2.0 Flash + Cloud Run. Submit a complex task (e.g. analyze a 50-page PDF) and a coordinated swarm of specialized agents (Planner, Researcher, Writer, Reviewer) divides, conquers, and delivers — with real-time SSE streaming and per-agent cost tracking.
fullDescription: Breaks complex tasks into subtasks via BruhPlanner, delegates to specialized agents, streams real-time progress via SSE, iteratively improves output if quality score < 80, and returns polished output with per-agent token cost tracking. Deployed on Cloud Run with auto-scaling.
problem: Long-running agentic tasks crash browsers, lose state mid-flight, and offer no mid-run visibility — so users can't trust them with real work.
solution: A planner-coordinated swarm on Cloud Run that streams per-agent progress over SSE, with quality gates that re-run only failing branches instead of the whole pipeline.
lessons: Agent orchestration is an observability problem, not just a routing problem — stream progress early and often.

name: Vyapar-Gyan
tagline: AI Marketplace with WhatsApp Commerce & Voice-First Shopping
shortDescription: Omnichannel commerce for Indian retailers. Customers shop via WhatsApp or web chat in 8 Indian languages using voice notes. Gemini 2.0 transcribes voice, extracts product intents, routes to seller. Features Khata book OCR, Razorpay Route splits, and Bedrock-powered dead-stock detection.
fullDescription: Full-stack serverless AWS architecture with 65+ Lambda handlers across 12 domains. Voice-first shopping in Hindi/English/Tamil/Telugu/Marathi/Bengali/Gujarati/Kannada. AWS Polly neural TTS for voice responses via WhatsApp. Proactive AI insights with severity scoring.
problem: India's next billion commerce users don't use web dashboards — they speak eight languages, live inside WhatsApp, and send voice notes, not typed SKUs.
solution: Voice-first WhatsApp commerce: Gemini transcribes and classifies voice notes, routes intents to 65+ Lambdas across 12 domains, and AWS Polly responds in the customer's dialect.
lessons: Voice-first isn't a novelty — it collapses a typing funnel that was quietly blocking non-English users entirely.

name: Omni-Lab
tagline: Empirical AI Tutor with Three Specialized Agents
shortDescription: Autonomous educational workspace powered by three AI agents: Teacher (Gemini 2.5 Flash Native Audio), Scientist (Gemini 3 Pro), Visualizer (Gemini 3 Flash). Upload any PDF → auto-generates slides, narrates via live voice, and lets you ask questions with real-time interruption. Generates videos via Veo.
fullDescription: Transforms static content into interactive, verifiable, visual lessons. Local VAD for barge-in voice interruptions. Scientist agent writes code to prove concepts rather than hallucinate. Flashcards, quizzes, infographics, and Veo-generated educational videos on demand.
problem: Static educational content (PDFs, slides, lecture videos) doesn't adapt to what a specific learner is confused about right now.
solution: Three specialized agents — Teacher (live voice with barge-in), Scientist (writes code to verify claims), Visualizer (Veo-generated videos) — turn any PDF into an interactive, interruptible lesson.
lessons: The cleanest way to stop LLMs hallucinating in education is to let a Scientist agent write code that proves or disproves its own claims.

name: Content Storyteller
tagline: Multimodal AI Platform for Marketing Assets
shortDescription: Transforms rough inputs (text, images, voice notes) into polished marketing assets — copy, visuals, storyboards, voiceover scripts, and short promo videos. Includes Trend Analyzer for AI-powered trend discovery across Instagram Reels, X/Twitter, and LinkedIn. Built on GCP with Vertex AI Gemini.
fullDescription: Output-intent inference determines which pipeline stages run per job. GIF generation for LinkedIn, live agent voice assistant with function calling and native audio, ZIP export bundle. 10 GCP services including Cloud Run, Pub/Sub, Firestore, Vertex AI.
problem: Marketing teams need polished multi-format output (copy, visuals, video, voiceover) from rough inputs — but most AI tools lock you into a single modality.
solution: Output-intent inference decides which pipeline stages run per job, so the same brief yields a LinkedIn GIF, a storyboard, and a Veo promo from ten coordinated GCP services.
lessons: Multimodal pipelines are cheaper when you infer intent upfront instead of running every stage blindly.

name: TCS Stock Forecasting
tagline: 20-Year Stock Analysis with ML, Deep Learning & Dashboard
shortDescription: Comprehensive data science project analyzing and forecasting TCS stock. Feature engineering with MACD/RSI/rolling stats, five models compared (Linear, Random Forest, XGBoost, LSTM, Prophet), and an interactive Streamlit dashboard with buy/sell signals via EMA crossover.
fullDescription: Linear Regression achieves R² ≈ 0.999 on trend fitting, LSTM delivers 246 RMSE with 0.827 R² on sequence forecasting. Dashboard supports 1D (1-min) to 5Y (weekly) timeframes with candlestick charts, MA20/MA50 overlays, and Sharpe ratio metrics.

name: Drugs Side Effects Analysis
shortDescription: Complete ML pipeline analyzing drug safety, efficacy, and patient experiences from Drugs.com. Trained 6 ML models (classification, regression, clustering), performed association rule mining on drug-condition-side effect patterns, and built 3 interactive Streamlit dashboards.
fullDescription: 11MB+ dataset processed through 7-step notebook workflow. Classification (Gradient Boosting), regression (rating prediction), NLP sentiment analysis (VADER, TextBlob), Apriori association mining. Safety profiling, risk flagging for pregnancy/alcohol/controlled substances.

name: IBM HR Attrition Prediction
tagline: Employee Attrition Analysis with Flask Dashboard
shortDescription: Predicts employee attrition using IBM's HR dataset (1470 × 35). Trained seven models including XGBoost (86% accuracy, 0.83 ROC-AUC), deployed via Flask web app that converts uploaded CSVs into dynamic Excel dashboards with automated HR recommendations.
fullDescription: Statistical analysis (ANOVA, correlation), ML comparison across Logistic Regression, SVM, Random Forest, XGBoost, LightGBM, CatBoost, AdaBoost. Flask app highlights attrition risk, job satisfaction, and overtime patterns.

name: Netflix Content Analytics
shortDescription: Modular pipeline for Netflix's 14-year content catalog: PostgreSQL ingestion, Python cleaning and feature engineering, advanced EDA (time-series, heatmaps, wordclouds, statistical tests), association-rule mining, ML models, and an interactive Streamlit dashboard.
fullDescription: Full reproducibility from data ingest through deployment. Statistical tests quantify content strategy shifts over time; association mining reveals genre-country co-occurrence patterns.

name: MCQ Tech Challenge
tagline: AI-Powered Quiz App with GitHub Cloud Sync
shortDescription: Modern MCQ quiz app built with vanilla JavaScript. Upload MCQ PDFs, get timed questions, and receive Google Gemini-powered performance analysis. Syncs scores across devices via a private GitHub Gist. Perfect for government job or certification prep.
fullDescription: Cross-platform (desktop/tablet/mobile), dark-mode UI, per-question and total time tracking. GitHub token stored locally; scores persisted in private Gist only the user can access. Gemini API analyzes weak topics and suggests study strategies.
